title: Наказателен кодекс — Компютърни престъпления (чл. 319a–319f)
description: Cybercrime provisions of the Bulgarian Penal Code (Наказателен кодекс), Chapter Nine-A, Articles 319a through 319f. Implements the requirements of the Council of Europe Convention on Cybercrime (Budapest Convention) and Council Framework Decision 2005/222/JHA on attacks against information systems, replaced by Directive 2013/40/EU.

provisions.title: Unauthorised access to a computer system
provisions.content: A person who gains unauthorised access to a computer system by circumventing security measures shall be punished by imprisonment of up to one year or by a fine of up to BGN 1,000. Where the act has been committed with the purpose of obtaining information constituting a trade secret or personal data, the punishment shall be imprisonment of up to three years or a fine of up to BGN 3,000. Where the act has caused significant damage or has been committed by a person in the exercise of his or her official duties, the punishment shall be imprisonment of one to three years.

provisions.title: Illegal interception of computer data
provisions.content: A person who, without right, intercepts by technical means non-public transmissions of computer data to, from, or within a computer system, including electromagnetic emissions from a computer system carrying such data, shall be punished by imprisonment of up to two years or a fine of up to BGN 3,000. Where the data intercepted constitutes personal data or state secrets, the punishment shall be imprisonment of one to five years. This provision implements the requirements of Article 3 of Directive 2013/40/EU on attacks against information systems.

provisions.title: Data interference
provisions.content: A person who, without right, deletes, damages, alters, suppresses, or renders inaccessible computer data in a computer system shall be punished by imprisonment of up to two years or a fine of up to BGN 3,000. Where the act has caused significant damage, the punishment shall be imprisonment of one to three years. Where the act has been committed against data of government bodies, critical infrastructure operators, or essential services, the punishment shall be imprisonment of two to six years.

provisions.title: System interference
provisions.content: A person who, without right, seriously hinders the functioning of a computer system by inputting, transmitting, damaging, deleting, deteriorating, altering, or suppressing computer data shall be punished by imprisonment of up to three years or a fine of up to BGN 5,000. Where the act is committed against information systems of government bodies, essential services, or critical infrastructure and results in significant disruption, the punishment shall be imprisonment of two to eight years. This provision implements the requirements of Article 4 of Directive 2013/40/EU.

provisions.title: Misuse of devices and tools
provisions.content: A person who produces, sells, procures for use, distributes, or otherwise makes available: a computer program designed or adapted primarily for the purpose of committing offences under Articles 319a to 319d; a computer password, access code, or similar data by which a computer system is capable of being accessed — with the intention that it be used for the purpose of committing an offence under Articles 319a to 319d, shall be punished by imprisonment of up to two years or a fine of up to BGN 3,000.

provisions.title: Computer fraud
provisions.content: A person who, with the intention of procuring an unlawful material benefit for himself or herself or for another person, causes damage to property by inputting, altering, deleting, or suppressing computer data, or by any interference with the functioning of a computer system, shall be punished by imprisonment of one to six years. Where the damage caused is significant or the act has been committed repeatedly, the punishment shall be imprisonment of two to eight years and a fine of up to BGN 10,000.

provisions.title: Aggravating circumstances
provisions.content: Where an offence under Articles 319a to 319f is committed: by a group or by an organised criminal group, the punishment shall be increased by one half; against systems processing classified information or data related to national security, the maximum punishment shall be increased by two thirds; by an official who has used his or her position to commit the offence, the punishment shall be the maximum provided for the respective offence.

provisions.title: Forfeiture and seizure
provisions.content: The means used and the items obtained through offences under Articles 319a to 319f shall be seized in favour of the State, regardless of whose property they are. Computer systems, software, and hardware used for the commission of the offence may be seized and forfeited by decision of the court. Data carriers containing illegally obtained data shall be destroyed.

provisions.title: Abuse of official position in electronic systems
provisions.content: A public official who uses his or her official position to gain unauthorised access to electronic information systems containing personal data or classified information shall be punished by imprisonment of one to six years. Where the act has resulted in disclosure of the information, the punishment shall be imprisonment of two to eight years and deprivation of the right to hold the respective office.

provisions.title: Preparation for computer crimes
provisions.content: A person who prepares to commit an offence under Articles 319a to 319f by acquiring tools, creating software, gathering passwords, or recruiting accomplices shall be punished by imprisonment of up to one year or a fine of up to BGN 1,000. Preparation committed by an organised criminal group shall be punishable by imprisonment of one to three years.

provisions.title: Electronic document forgery
provisions.content: A person who creates a false electronic document or alters the content of an electronic document with the purpose of using it to prove the existence or absence of a right or obligation, or who uses such a document, shall be punished by imprisonment of one to six years. Where the act has been committed by an official in the exercise of his or her duties, the punishment shall be imprisonment of two to eight years.

provisions.title: Damage to communications infrastructure
provisions.content: A person who destroys, damages, or renders unusable an electronic communications network, electronic communications facility, or part thereof, shall be punished by imprisonment of up to five years. Where the act has caused significant disruption to the provision of essential services or has endangered human health or safety, the punishment shall be imprisonment of two to eight years.

definitions.definition: Any device or group of interconnected or related devices, one or more of which, pursuant to a program, performs automatic processing of data.
Any representation of facts, information or concepts in a form suitable for processing in a computer system, including a program suitable to cause a computer system to perform a function.
